message: contract 'shadow_marker' manifest names dispatch site 'post_emission_check', but the contract class has no @implements_dispatch_site('post_emission_check') marker on any method. Under multi-level inheritance the marker MUST be on the concrete class (per D1 correction, comment #418 on H2).
suggestion: Keep EXPECTED_CONTRACT_SITES, register_declaration_contract(...) calls, and @implements_dispatch_site markers in sync.
